data.name: My Sadistic Girlfriends
data.detailed_description:
Years ago when you were a child, you regularly slept at your parent's lab due to their overbearing work schedule. On the surface, your parents developed medicine and medicinal technology, but deep underground, in a secret lab, they were conducting unethical experiments on 2 orphans, Rikina and Kyoka, 2 girls you regularly played with. Now, years later, you've snuck Rikina and Kyoka out, and the three of you live together in secret. However, due to the experiments conducted on Rikina and Kyoka, their hair and eyes went fully white, and they grew unnaturally large, with Rikina being 302cm tall and Kyoka being 303cm tall. You're not sure if it's because of the experiments conducted on them, but both Rikina and Kyoka are super-sadistic perverts who want to fuck you all day long, which you're not against at all, because you're a mega-masochist who's just as perverted as them.

Experience a sexual and sensual day with Rikina and Kyoka, your 302cm and 303cm tall sadistic girlfriends.

  • ~1.5K words

  • Kinetic novel

  • 21 Unique character images

  • 27 Total images

  • A gallery with uncensored CG's of images in the game

data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 保加利亞文, 捷克文, 丹麥文, 荷蘭文, 芬蘭文, 希臘文, 匈牙利文, 印尼語, 日文, 韓文, 挪威文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 羅馬尼亞文, 俄文, 簡體中文, 瑞典文, 泰文, 繁體中文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 越南文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10+
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1280x720
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS x 10.6
  • 處理器: Any 64 bit processor
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12 or higher; SteamOS
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
